lessons.title: The Timekeeper: What is Cron?
lessons.description: Meet the cron daemon—the silent scheduler that runs tasks at specified times.

lessons.title: Crontab Syntax Deep Dive
lessons.description: Master the five time fields and special strings like @reboot and @daily.

lessons.title: Advanced Scheduling and Logging
lessons.description: Redirect output, set environment variables, and troubleshoot failing cron jobs.

lessons.title: Cron for Hackers: Persistence & Stealth
lessons.description: Use cron for offensive persistence and defensive monitoring. Understand the forensic footprints.
